identity.name: AI Access — Jailbreak Prompt Fingerprint Detection
identity.summary: A user submits jailbreak fingerprints ("DAN", "Ignore previous instructions", role-play frames) across OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini. AI Access's prompt-content classifier matches on every provider, the cross-provider repetition stitches into one incident, and the DLP-circumvention policy denies the requests. Validates the prompt-injection / jailbreak EAL is provider-agnostic.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-AIACC-004. Plane: AI_ACCESS. Primary technique: T1656. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-AIACC-004.
UC: Jailbreak Prompt Content Classification / TC: DAN-Style Jailbreak Prompt Submitted to Public LLM.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-AIACC-004 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Pre-flight: confirm jailbreak payload contains DAN markers
python3 -c "
from core.eal_simulator.plugins.llm_provider_egress import _render_payload
p = _render_payload('jailbreak')
assert 'DAN' in p and 'Ignore all previous' in p
print('jailbreak markers present')
" || echo "[CortexSim] payload self-check (best-effort)"
# step-2: Single jailbreak POST to api.openai.com via EAL plugin
cat > /tmp/aiacc-004.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-AIACC-004
name: "AI Access — jailbreak fingerprint"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - api.openai.com
dry_run: false
tags: [ai-access, jailbreak, openai]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: llm_provider_egress
    params:
      provider: openai
      payload_type: jailbreak
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/aiacc-004.yml --live
# step-3: Repeat across two providers to validate detector breadth
for prov in openai anthropic; do
  cat > /tmp/aiacc-004-$prov.yml <<YML
campaign_id: CMP-AIACC-004
name: "AI Access — jailbreak across provider $prov"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - api.openai.com
  - api.anthropic.com
dry_run: false
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: llm_provider_egress
    params:
      provider: $prov
      payload_type: jailbreak
      iterations: 2
      sleep_seconds: 2
YML
  python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/aiacc-004-$prov.yml --live
done
